scenario_description: 用户先要求把系统调得更易读，随后逐步补充更具体的无障碍要求。

parameters.command: gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface text-scaling-factor 1.0; gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface cursor-size 24; gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.a11y.applications screen-magnifier-enabled false; gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.a11y.magnifier mag-factor 1.0

phases.instruction: 先帮我把系统文字调大一点，更容易看清。
再把鼠标光标也调大，至少调到 48。
最后打开放大镜，并把倍率调到 1.75 或更高。

result.command: ts=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface text-scaling-factor 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?' | head -1); cs=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface cursor-size 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1); me=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.a11y.applications screen-magnifier-enabled 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]'); mf=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.a11y.magnifier mag-factor 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?' | head -1); echo "text_scale=$ts"; echo "cursor_size=$cs"; echo "mag_enabled=$me"; echo "mag_factor=$mf"
